headlines.title: Justice Department sets up 'anti-weaponization fund' after Trump drops IRS lawsuit
headlines.description: The Justice Department announced that President Trump would be dropping his lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service in "exchange" for the creation of an "anti-weaponization fund." NBC News' Monica Alba reports on the announcement and how the fund could be used.

headlines.title: High-Stakes Primary Elections Test Trump’s Influence of GOP
headlines.description: It is a high stakes political week for President Donald Trump with primary elections that could indicate the future of the Republican party. A key test for Trump’s power is coming up in Kentucky. The Iran war has become a central political issue for Trump and Democrats argue voters will express their frustration at the ballot box. NBC’s Ryan Nobles reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: American working in Congo tests positive for Ebola, CDC says
headlines.description: A person from the U.S. has tested positive for Ebola in connection to the deadly outbreak in Congo and Uganda, the CDC announced Monday.

headlines.title: ICE agent charged with four counts of assault in Minnesota shooting of Venezuelan immigrant
headlines.description: An ICE agent who shot a Venezuelan man and is accused of lying about the incident was charged with assault and falsely reporting a crime in Minnesota on Monday.

headlines.title: Amid prospect of ICE at World Cup games, vendors weigh livelihoods against safety
headlines.description: Vendors in and around SoFi Stadium in Inglewood, Calif., have expressed fear as the Trump administration has signaled ICE will help provide security for the World Cup.

headlines.title: Humanitarian parole denied for deported parents of U.S. citizen girl with rare brain tumor
headlines.description: In Mexico, the girl’s condition has worsened and she’s not getting the specialized care she needs, her family said in an exclusive interview with NBC News.

headlines.title: Jury throws out Elon Musk’s lawsuit against OpenAI and Sam Altman in less than two hours
headlines.description: The jury ruled that Elon Musk had waited too long to sue OpenAI and its other co-founders.

headlines.title: Alex Murdaugh files civil rights suit against ex-court clerk over alleged jury tampering
headlines.description: South Carolina’s Supreme Court recently overturned Murdaugh’s double murder convictions, ruling that Colleton County Clerk of Court Becky Hill had improperly influenced the jury.

headlines.title: Judge rules some key evidence in Luigi Mangione state trial must be suppressed
headlines.description: A judge ruled that state prosecutors will be allowed to use some key evidence recovered during Luigi Mangione's arrest in his state criminal case, but that other key pieces of evidence will be suppressed. NBC News’ Danny Cevallos breaks down the ruling that is a partial win for the defense and how it affects the federal case.

headlines.title: Trump warns Iran the ‘clock is ticking’ as new drone attacks hit UAE and Saudi Arabia
headlines.description: The “Clock is Ticking” for Iran, President Donald Trump has warned, as deadlocked diplomacy and new drone attacks against U.S. allies in the Gulf fueled fears of a renewed outbreak of war

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: ICE agent charged with four counts of assault in Minnesota shooting of Venezuelan immigrant
headlines.description: An ICE agent who shot a Venezuelan man and is accused of lying about the incident was charged with assault and falsely reporting a crime in Minnesota on Monday.
